key.name: decimal-places
key.description: Maximum number of decimal places for displayed results.

key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of recent calculations saved in history.

key.name: use-degrees
key.description: When disabled, trigonometric functions use radians.

key.name: copy-result-to-clipboard
key.description: Copy each successful result to the clipboard.

key.name: clear-on-close
key.description: Clears the current expression whenever the popup closes.
